name: ARTS WAY MANUFACTURING CO INC
business: Art's-Way Manufacturing Co., Inc. manufactures and distributes agricultural equipment under the Art's-Way name, and modular buildings for research and animal containment through its subsidiary. It sells agricultural equipment through a network of independent dealers in the U.S., Canada, Australia, Japan, and the UK, and sells modular buildings directly to end-users such as academic and government research institutions.

exposures.sentence: Our Agricultural Products segment manufactures and distributes farm equipment under the Art s-Way name.
Our Modular Buildings segment manufactures modular buildings for various uses, commonly animal containment and research laboratories, through our wholly owned subsidiary, Art s-Way Scientific, Inc.
